narrative:
Coshocton 1-B (precinct in Coshocton County) has 921 registered voters, with 68.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
